# V63 — GoalOS Mission Autopilot

V63 adds `/goalos-mission-autopilot.html`, a browser-local public-safe mission console.

## Release scope

- New Mission Autopilot page.
- New CSS and JavaScript assets.
- New JSON demo contract and schema.
- New production tests and post-build kernel.
- Route manifest updated to 67 public routes.
- Homepage, command layers, route catalogs, and documentation updated.

## Safety posture

The console is local-only and does not transmit the objective, store it, connect wallets, approve tokens, broadcast transactions, or activate production authority.
